What's included for your whole family

Three care pillars. One membership. Every person (and pet) in your household covered.

Medical Care

Unlimited virtual visits for urgent care, primary care, and chronic condition management â€” for every family member.

Get a prescription or care plan in minutes, not hours.

Behavioral Health

Licensed therapists for anxiety, depression, stress, parenting support, and more â€” available on your schedule.

Book a session this week, not next month.

TeleVet

Video consults for your pets â€” wellness checks, skin issues, behavioral concerns, and after-hours triage.

Avoid the emergency vet for non-critical issues.

NABV Member Reward Program

After 90 days, earn from your referral

This isn't the reason to join â€” it's a thank-you. After 90 days of active use, NABV-negotiated commissions let you earn from monthly revenue when colleagues enroll through you.

90-Day Active Use

Use the service for your family. After 3 months, you qualify.

Share Your Link

Refer fellow NABV members. They get the same member rate.

Earn Monthly

NABV-negotiated commission on revenue from your referrals.

This is a reward, not the lead reason.Join for your family's care. The referral benefit is NABV's way of saying thank you for spreading the word.

Questions from NABV members

The three things members ask before unlocking their rate.

Is the discount real or is there a catch?

The discount is real â€” NABV negotiated it directly with iWILL 'til I'm Well for all current members. There's no catch, no hidden fees, and no contract. You pay the member rate ($35 individual / $55 family) as long as you're a NABV member. Cancel anytime.

I have insurance and a vet already â€” why would I need this?

This doesn't replace insurance or your primary vet. It's a complement: $0 copay virtual visits for things insurance makes expensive or slow (urgent care, therapy, pet triage). Use it for after-hours questions, prescription refills, behavioral health, or when you can't get an appointment. Many members keep insurance for major events and use this for everything else.

What's the catch with the affiliate reward?

No catch â€” it's a thank-you from NABV, not an MLM. After 90 days of active use (so you know the service), you qualify for a NABV-negotiated commission on revenue from members who enroll through your link. You don't sell anything. You just share a benefit you already use. The reward is optional and never the reason to join.

Unlock your NABV member rate

Takes 30 seconds. No payment. No password. Just your member code.

By submitting, you confirm you're a current NABV member. We'll verify eligibility and email your promo code. No payment or password required.
